name: Assault
description: Infiltrate a guarded location and destroy its vital assets before the enemy can muster a full defense.

scoringRules.description: +1 VP to Side controlling majority of remaining VPs at game end

specialRules.name: Rupture Action
specialRules.description: Free Attacker model in base-contact with VP spends 2 AP Fiddle action and passes Unopposed INT Test (DR 2) to destroy it

specialRules.name: Time Pressure
specialRules.description: If no VP is destroyed by End of Turn 3/4/5, the game ends immediately

_balance.notes: Asymmetric - Attacker has BP advantage but time pressure
